overall.description: Spider-Man perched on a skyscraper ledge overlooking a bustling Times Square-like urban intersection. Third-person game engine footage from a Marvel's Spider-Man title, showing the character observing heavy traffic and digital billboards below before preparing to web-swing.

scene_state.functional_zone: skyscraper ledge overlooking major urban intersection with digital billboards

events.description: Spider-Man raises arm and activates web-shooters, preparing to swing away from the building

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man crouches on the building ledge surveying the city traffic below, then shifts posture to shoot a web toward the right

entered.detail: Tall glass facade building with reflective windows framing the left side of the view
Large digital advertising screens including a prominent red billboard with Spider-Man imagery visible across the intersection
High-rise building covered with multiple digital advertisement screens and illuminated signage
Multi-lane avenue filled with yellow taxis and various vehicles moving through the downtown intersection
Concrete ledge with metal railing where Spider-Man is perched, overlooking the street below

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man sits perched on a skyscraper ledge high above a bustling urban intersection resembling Times Square, framed by modern glass towers covered in vivid digital billboards. Heavy traffic flows through the multi-lane streets below with moderate pedestrian activity on the sidewalks. The scene is bathed in bright afternoon sunlight. Near the end of the clip, Spider-Man activates his web-shooters and prepares to swing away from the building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a static observation of a vibrant city center and ends with the anticipation of a sudden descent. It begins with Spider-Man perched on a high skyscraper ledge, overlooking a bustling urban intersection framed by modern glass towers and vivid digital billboards. As the camera captures the heavy flow of traffic and pedestrian activity in the bright afternoon sunlight, the focus remains on the scale of the city below. The scene then shifts from a moment of stillness to action as Spider-Man activates his web-shooters, preparing to launch himself away from the building and into the urban canyon.
